CONTENT.Club career: Ćirković started his professional career with Serbian SuperLiga club Rad in the 2010–11 season. He was also loaned to Serbian League Vojvodina club Palić in the 2011–12 season. On 20 August 2014, Ćirković signed a four-year contract with Partizan. He made his official debut for the club in a UEFA Europa League game against Tottenham Hotspur on 18 September 2014.
CONTENT.External links: Lazar Ćirković at Soccerway.comLazar Ćirković at WorldFootball.netLazar Ćirković at FBref.comLazar Ćirković at AS.com (in Spanish)
CONTENT.International career: Ćirković made his competitive debut for the Serbia national under-21 team in a 3–1 home win over Northern Ireland on 15 October 2013, playing for the team intermittently till 2015. He was a member of the team at the 2015 UEFA Under-21 Championship.

SUMMARY: Lazar Ćirković (Serbian Cyrillic: Лазар Ћирковић; born 22 August 1992) is a Serbian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back.
